LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JOSE GAVIRIA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS DENIED. IT IS TOO LATE TO BRING A MOTION TO QUASH SINCE A DEFAULT HAS BEEN ENTERED. THE MOTION TO VACATE IS UNTIMELY AND NOT SUPPORTED BY THE REQUIRED DOCUMENTS. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. AT 10:15 A.M., THE CASE WAS RECALLED BECAUSE OF THE LATE APPEARANCE OF THE MOVING PARTY, JOSE GAVIRIA, HOWEVER, THE PREVIOUS RULING OF THE COURT STANDS AFTER A BRIEF ARGUMENT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: DIANE CHEN CSR # 11312 301/PJB

calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert M. Sellards, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Santiago Aceves, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Jose Gaviria.
Default was entered against defendant on August 8, 2008.
Clerk's Judgment for Possession of the subject property was entered on August 8, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, October 16, 2008.

Plaintiff introduced the following exhibits:

Exhibit 1---A copy of the judgment file endorsed August 8, 2008----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---A copy of the complaint filed endorsed July 16, 2008---------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---A copy of the Lease Agreement dated April 1, 2006------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Santiago Aceves, and against the Defaulted Defendant Jose Gaviria as follows:

Past Due Rent - $17,400.00.
Holdover Damages - $1,600.00.
Attorney's Fees - $2,860.00.
Costs - $395.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $22,255.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
JOSE GAVIRIA, IN PROPRIA PERSONA, (415)756-7725, DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY
THOMAS LATOWSKI, ESQ., (415)585-2122, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, SANTIAGO ACEVES

THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JOSE GAVIRIA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS DENIED. IT IS TOO LATE TO BRING A MOTION TO QUASH SINCE A DEFAULT HAS BEEN ENTERED. THE MOTION TO VACATE IS UNTIMELY AND NOT SUPPORTED BY THE REQUIRED DOCUMENTS. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. AT 10:15 A.M., THE CASE WAS RECALLED BECAUSE OF THE LATE APPEARANCE OF THE MOVING PARTY, JOSE GAVIRIA, HOWEVER, THE PREVIOUS RULING OF THE COURT STANDS AFTER A BRIEF ARGUMENT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Diane Chen CSR # 11312 301/PJB
